name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram is a money transfer and financial services company operating through agent locations nationwide, enabling consumers to send and receive money in person or online.
description_long:
MoneyGram is an established money transfer service that operates through a network of agent locations across the United States. The company functions as a facilitator for financial transactions rather than a direct service provider, partnering with retail and service locations to offer consumer-accessible money movement services. This distributed agent model allows MoneyGram to maintain extensive geographic coverage without requiring consumers to visit dedicated company-owned branches.

MoneyGram's core service offering centers on domestic money transfer capabilities. Consumers can send and receive money through their network of physical agent locations, with the flexibility to conduct transactions either in person at participating locations or through online channels. The company emphasizes convenience and accessibility, allowing customers to locate nearby agent locations through their website's search and mapping tools. Their service addresses the fundamental consumer need for quick money movement between parties.

MoneyGram distinguishes itself through its widespread agent network model rather than proprietary retail locations. This approach provides extensive geographic reach, particularly in communities served by the partner retail establishments hosting their service counters. The combination of online and in-person transaction options attempts to serve diverse consumer preferences and digital literacy levels. Their focus on established locations suggests reliability and local accessibility for unbanked or underbanked populations.

MoneyGram's primary limitation is its positioning strictly within money transfer and basic financial services. The website content does not indicate offerings in credit products, lending, financial counseling, or comprehensive banking services. Consumers seeking integrated financial solutions beyond money movement would need to access additional providers. The reliance on third-party agent locations means service quality and availability varies by specific location, as evidenced by the example location (MoneyGram at Video Club partner retail).
address: 333 Highland Ave Ste E, National City, CA 91950

company_info.headquarters: 333 Highland Ave Ste E, National City, CA 91950

pros: Nationwide network of agent locations providing convenient access across the United States
Dual transaction channels—both in-person and online options for flexibility
Interactive location finder using maps and address/ZIP code search functionality
Established brand with long operational history in money transfer services
Physical locations embedded in accessible retail partners rather than requiring dedicated travel
Serves unbanked and underbanked populations through community-based agent locations
cons: Limited service scope—money transfer only, without lending, credit building, or broader financial products
Service quality and availability dependent on individual agent location operations
No mention of fee transparency or competitive pricing information on website
Reliance on third-party retail partners (like Video Club) may create inconsistent consumer experience
Website does not detail speed of fund delivery or processing times
best_for: Consumers needing to send or receive money domestically without bank accounts
Individuals seeking convenient in-person money transfer at nearby retail locations
Unbanked and underbanked populations with limited access to traditional banking services
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for consumers needing quick domestic money transfers without bank accounts, particularly those in communities with agent locations. The main caveat is that MoneyGram offers no credit products, lending, or financial building services—it is strictly a money movement platform suitable only for basic transfer needs.
services: Domestic money transfer—sending money to recipients nationwide
Money receiving—accepting transferred funds at agent locations
In-person transaction services at agent locations
Location search and mapping tool for finding nearby agents
